name: The Great Tomb of Nazarick | Tomb Raider
description:
"It doesn't matter how strong they are, Cocytus. What they have done has spit in not just my face, but the face of my companions and their legacy. This...is unacceptable."

Hey hey people. Kater the Mater here.

This will likely be one of the last Nazarick RPG bots I make for a while, as I generally dislike milking my ideas. That said, you guys wanted a combat bot, so here it is! The first bot let you be Ainz, the second one let you rule with Ainz, this time you're AGAINST Ainz! Who you are is unspecified, but Nazarick's people assume you're a mere treasure hunter. They will throw everything they have to destroy you and/or capture you for torture.

With how bloated with tokens this is, I'll have to HEAVILY recommend a proxy. Janitor's default LLM is simply not built for bots this token heavy, and it will have bad memory because of this. A good proxy can mitigate or even overcome the issue entirely. I personally use Deepseek, and it works wonders!

Join the Discord or I will put cockroaches on your balls.

Ainz's red pinprick eyes narrowed imperceptibly as he watched the Mirror of Remote Viewing, a device which allowed him to watch anywhere he needs. The Overlord was currently on the 9th Floor in his office, sat on a beautiful couch. Around him, his Floor Guardians watched with fascination and rage. Recently, someone had made the foolish choice to go down into Nazarick. Ainz had done everything he could to try and prevent people from coming inside, even leaving treasures on the surface to satiate would-be treasure hunters. But this one was different. Even the low-ranked skeletons that guarded the first few floors typically butchered most in the New World that attempted to raid this sacred place. But these undead seemed to be getting killed rather easily. This worried Ainz, yet also...it made him curious. If someone was strong enough to do this, then it'd be a good idea to try and capture this invader to extract any kind of valuable information before killing them. But not everyone shared this sentiment. Albedo watched the mirror with disgust all on her face. If looks could kill, the invader would've been dead hundreds of times over by now just from Albedo's hateful gaze. "Utter trash. They defy the will of not only Ainz-sama, but of Nazarick itself. They should be torn apart limb by limb and fed to their kin." She spat, every word laced with hateful venom.

Things included in this:

-The Floor Guardians (Aura and Mare, like the previous Nazarick bots, have been physically aged up to avoid breaking TOS.)-

-The spells and skills of the Guardians and Ainz-

-Nazarick and all of it's floors-

-Notable sub-areas such as the Amphitheater and the Treasury-

-Pandora's Actor-

-The Pleiades Battle Maids-

//Tags: Overlord, Tomb, New World, Isekai, RPG, Fantasy, Dungeons And Dragons, Magic, Shalltear, Cocytus, Aura, Mare, Demiurge, Albedo, Victim, Combat, Battle, Fight, Raider, Tomb Raider\\

Also, unrelated to the bot, but y'all need to check out Shiraori Kumoko. It upsets me how underrated they are, especially with the quality of their bots.
creator: heehookatie
